include: parallel within-harness dispatch for eligible pending effects
dependency-aware effect ordering based on explicit ctx.parallel scheduler hints
deterministic SDK and agent-platform regression tests
exclude: new effect kinds unrelated to ConcurrentEffects
live external harness credentials in tests

qualityGates: Sequential behavior remains default unless concurrent-effects is supported.
Explicit ctx.parallel groups can dispatch concurrently within maxConcurrency.
Every settled sibling result is committed before replay continues.
Mixed success/failure does not drop successes.
Journal commits are serialized per run in deterministic action order.
No live harness credentials are required for regression tests.
BackgroundEffects and MultiHarnessDispatch stay out of implementation scope.
